title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Marks & Spencer India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Marks & Spencer India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Marks & Spencer India! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Varanasi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Marks & Spencer India:
Marks & Spencer India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marks & Spencer India!
